Author: Ulanzi
Name: Agent Pets
Overview: Desktop pets that hatch and evolve as your agent's token usage grows.
Description: Pick one of three pets (Slime, Kitcat, Draco), give it a name, and watch it grow through 15 stages driven by agent token usage (in demo mode: run time x a fixed rate, ~0.2M tokens/hour). The pet shows its status with an icon (working / sleeping / done), plus live run time and name. Long-press 2s to delete the current pet.

Actions.Name: Agent Pet
Actions.Tooltip: Raise a pet that grows with your agent's token usage
